content.en:
"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, hurry up and let the Nine Extremes General stop!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable roared angrily when he saw that a Supreme True Ancestor who had a good relationship with him was about to die.

However, Ye Tian was indifferent.

Now, there are more True Ancestors who have died in the Void Heaven True Kingdom, how can it be possible for him to stop!

The more True Ancestors he killed, the less pressure there was on the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Realm.

In an instant, another Supreme True Ancestor fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Because Ye Tian's speed was too fast, his support ability was very terrifying, even if he was far away, he could reach it instantly.

Even though the entire battlefield covered a large area of the Void Heaven True Country, Ye Tian could still support in time.

However, even so, the top True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom still fell several times, and the situation was still very unfavorable for the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

Although according to this trend, the Void Heaven True Kingdom will eventually win the victory, but once there are too many True Ancestors who have died, the foundation of the Void Heaven True Kingdom will be shaken, and I don't know how long it will take to recover its strength!

"These three Invincible True Ancestors must be killed as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But it is very difficult for the Invincible True Ancestor to kill the Invincible True Ancestor.

Even if his strength far surpassed the three Invincible True Ancestors such as Changfeng Sword Venerable, there was no way to kill them in a short period of time.

"Forbidden Body!"

"Great Wilderness Law Body!"

"Ten Thousand True Spears!"

"Selfless vacuum!"

"Tiangang is extremely fast!"

Ye Tian almost used all the means, completely beating the three invincible True Ancestors, such as the Zi Chi True Ancestor and the Zi Gang True Ancestor were almost shattered by Ye Tian several times, but they had a lot of life-saving things, and their recovery ability was also fast, so they were only injured lightly, and they were not killed by Ye Tian.

But the three of them were also shocked by Ye Tian's combat power, their attacks were completely tickling for Ye Tian, and they couldn't shake Ye Tian at all, and Ye Tian's every blow could break their Dao weapons and the body of the True Ancestor.

It can be said that they are completely hanged, and after a long time, they will even be killed.

"I'm afraid that the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor has reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, and it is even more terrifying than the Bloody General!" Changfeng Sword Venerable commented.

I have to say that among the more than a hundred Upper Triple Heaven forces in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there is not a single invincible true ancestor who can compete with Ye Tian.

"Changfeng Sword Venerable, we must find someone to support, otherwise even we will be in danger!" the Purple Crimson True Ancestor hurriedly said.

The Zixia Sect was powerless to support, and the only two invincible true ancestors were sent, and they were unable to send any more invincible true ancestors.

Therefore, the only force that had the ability to send an invincible True Ancestor was the Heavenly Sword Sect.

The Heavenly Sword Sect has three Invincible True Ancestors, in addition to the Heavenly Sword Sect, there are also two Invincible True Ancestors, but one of the Invincible True Ancestors is on another battlefield.

There is only one invincible true ancestor left to guard the mountain gate of the Heavenly Sword Sect, and under normal circumstances, he will not leave easily.

After all, the Invincible True Ancestor also needs to protect his own sect, in case an enemy invades the sect, without the Invincible True Ancestor in charge, other True Ancestors may not be able to protect the sect.

But now, on the battlefield of the Void Heaven True Kingdom, the six major forces are very dangerous, and once the Changfeng Sword Venerable falls, the Heavenly Sword Sect will suffer heavy losses.

Moreover, the Heavenly Sword Sect's Supreme True Ancestor and the Top True Ancestor were falling one by one, and such losses were too heavy.

"Okay, I'll send a message to the Heavenly Sword Sect and let them come to support!"

The Changfeng Sword replied.

Heavenly Sword Sect.

The Golden Light Sword Venerable who was sitting in the sect received a summons from the Changfeng Sword Venerable, and after seeing the content of the message, his expression suddenly changed greatly.

"What, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor has reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is not the Nine Extremes General, the Nine Extremes General has other people, and he is still slaughtering the True Ancestor of our Heavenly Sword Sect!"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable was shocked by this news, and if it weren't for the Changfeng Sword Venerable personally sending a message, he wouldn't have believed it at all.

From the interrogation, he also knew how dangerous the battle situation was, although on the whole, the Void Heaven True Kingdom was at a disadvantage, but the Void Heaven True Kingdom was only a few ordinary True Ancestors, elite True Ancestors, and a few top True Ancestors.

This kind of loss is nothing, and their Heavenly Sword Sect's Supreme True Ancestor and Top True Ancestor are constantly falling, this is the biggest loss!

The fall of a supreme true ancestor is more heart-wrenching than the fall of 10,000 elite true ancestors.

"You open the Great Sect Protector Array, don't leave the sect during this time, and don't allow any true ancestor to come in, even if it's the true ancestor of our Heavenly Sword Sect, you are not allowed to let it in!"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable summoned the many true ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect, Dao.

The True Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect realized that the Golden Light Sword Venerable was leaving the Heavenly Sword Sect, and it must have taken a huge change on the battlefield, and they all responded: "Yes!"

......

Void and innocent country.

The war was still going on, and at this moment, under Ye Tian's full strength, the Zichi True Ancestor was already seriously injured, and he himself was only an invincible True Ancestor at the elite level, not at the level of the Blood Demon General.

Because, his strength was much weaker than that of Zigang True Ancestor and Changfeng Sword Venerable, and Ye Tian specifically targeted him and dealt him heavy blows again and again.

If this continues, it won't be long before he falls.

Once he fell, the Changfeng Sword Venerable and the Zigang True Ancestor would be under a lot of pressure.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is terrifying!"

Zi Chi True Ancestor said with great fear in his heart.

Such a fight is meaningless at all, and it can even be said that he is not fighting, but being abused.

If he knew that Ye Tian was so terrifying, he wouldn't even agree to attack the Void Heaven True Country.

Abrupt.

An extremely sharp supreme sword dao aura descended, and this supreme sword dao aura reached half of it, which was much more powerful than the supreme sword dao mastered by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"It's the Golden Light Sword Venerable who has arrived!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable breathed a sigh of relief.

The strength of the Golden Light Sword Venerable is even more powerful than him, and he once fought with the bloody generals without falling behind.

As long as the Golden Light Sword Venerable arrives, he can contain the Nine Extremes General.

In this way, the remaining True Ancestors of the Six Great Forces can also destroy the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

"Slash!"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable arrived, slashed out a sword at the peak level, and killed Ye Tian, the Nine Extremes General who was fighting.

However, Ye Tian urged the Great Wilderness Law Body and the Forbidden Body to block this sword violently, and casually killed a top true ancestor of the Zixia Sect in an instant.

"It hurt me!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised when he saw a sword mark on his body.

He had broken the record of the strongest defense in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and although the Golden Light Sword Venerable had not completely broken his defense, the supreme sword aura contained in it had hurt him a little bit through the defense.

However, this kind of damage is useless, and it can be recovered in an instant.

But this is also enough to prove that the attack power of the Golden Light Sword Venerable is much more powerful than the Changfeng Sword Venerable, after all, the Changfeng Sword Venerable can't hurt him.

"General Jiuji, let's stay and fight!"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable released a Thousand Dao Techniques in the Heavenly Sword Sect - Sword Light True Domain!

Bang!!!!

The Sword Light True Domain enveloped this area, binding the void here, and like the Thousand Dao Techniques in the Selfless Vacuum, it could block the void and suppress the enemy.

Under such a Thousand Dao technique, Ye Tian's speed was greatly affected.

In addition, the Golden Light Sword Venerable has been attacking him, interfering with his speed, and it is a little difficult to support others for a while.

Of course.

If Ye Tian didn't fight with the Golden Light Sword Venerable and left with all his might, the Golden Light Sword Venerable would not be able to stop him.

However, that doesn't make much sense, and supporting others with all your might is a waste of time.

Fortunately, he had previously killed nearly 20 Supreme True Ancestors and hundreds of top True Ancestors, reducing the tremendous pressure on the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

But he also knew very well that the true ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom still couldn't stop the offensive of the six major forces.

However, he didn't worry too much because he still had his cards.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian and the Golden Light Sword Venerable fought, completely suppressing the other party, and the strength of the Golden Light Sword Venerable lies in the attack, and the defense is a little worse.

As a result, the Golden Light Sword Venerable was constantly injured in the battle with Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian wanted to kill the Golden Light Sword Venerable, but it was very difficult, and without a long fight, he couldn't kill the other party at all.

And in such a situation, the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom fell one by one, and even the True Ancestor of the Shooting Moon was besieged by several Supreme True Ancestors, and he was seriously injured.

On the other side, the six Supreme True Ancestors gathered and killed Xiao Yue, who was already injured.

They felt that no one would be able to rescue Xiao Yue this time, and they would definitely be able to kill Xiao Yue.

However, just when they had just killed Xiao Yue's side, ready to break out a killing move to severely damage or even kill Xiao Yue, a woman's voice came.

"You want to kill Sister Xiao Yue, I won't allow it!"

As soon as the words fell, a woman appeared, it was Ouyang Jiu'er.

Ye Tianlai asked Ouyang Jiu'er to make a move at a critical moment before he came, if he could handle it, then Ouyang Jiu'er wouldn't need to make a move!

But now, Xiao Yue is in danger, so Ouyang Jiu'er naturally takes action.

In an instant, the six Supreme True Ancestors were directly frozen by Ouyang Jiu'er's Thousands of Dao Technique Ice Ling Cold Realm, and although they did not die, they were severely injured one by one.

Click!

The frozen world shattered, and the bodies of the six Supreme True Ancestors were torn into pieces one by one, and although they healed, their injuries were extremely serious.

Then, Ouyang Jiu'er took out a sword, and six sword lights descended, hitting them again.

In less than ten seconds, the six Supreme True Ancestors completely lost their vitality.

Six Supreme True Ancestors died at once, and the Golden Light Sword Venerable opened his eyes angrily, because five of these six Supreme True Ancestors belonged to their Heavenly Sword Sect.
